subcodes.first_line: Every soul who in this Day hath attained unto this Most Great, Most Wondrous Cause and remained steadfast therein hath verily attained unto all good [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی الیوم باین امر ابدع اعظم فائز شد و مستقیم ماند او بجمیع خیر فائزست
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
